response.overview: A Murder mystery film, the police force have many hardships so they call in the best of the best. Detective Ruth and Assistant Detective William. The 2 detectives embark on a quest to solve the murders of 6 individuals at the Vegreville Community Centre... no bodies were found and a lot of questions left unanswered. The Burlap killer hides his tracks well and they have troubles finding out who he is... will they figure out who he is... will they figure out who murdered the 6 individuals or will they fall like the rest?
response.tagline: Six murders, no bodies, too many questions.
response.title: The Burlap Case
